This description is saved with the video: This description is saved with the video and archived to history.
Input any language in natural language,: Input any language in natural language, as long as llm can understand
Whether to burn subtitles into the video: Whether to burn subtitles into the video, will increase processing time
Automatically use a mid-lower floating b: Automatically use a mid-lower floating bilingual subtitle layout for 9:16 portrait videos
Portrait font sizes use a 576px-wide ref: Font sizes are based on a 576px-wide portrait reference and scale with output width.
Positive portrait offsets move the compl: Positive values move the complete group upward; negative values move it downward.
The encoded source hard-subtitle font ca: Sets the Chinese translation size only. The encoded source hard-subtitle font cannot be changed.
Original video has source hard subtitles: Original video has source hard subtitles
When source hard subtitles already exist: Auto detection is conservative; it burns only translated subtitles above source hard subtitles only when detection is reliable. If detection is inaccurate, choose no hard subtitles or source hard subtitles manually.
Vertical offset for translated subtitles: Vertical offset for translated subtitles when source hard subtitles already exist; positive moves up, negative moves down. Preview updates live.
Vertical offset for translated subtitles in bilingual mode; positive moves up, negative moves down. Preview updates live.
Vertical offset for the whole bilingual: Vertical offset for the whole bilingual subtitle block; positive moves up, negative moves down. Preview updates live.
Recommended for videos with loud backgro: Recommended for videos with loud background noise, but will increase processing time
Please refer to Github homepage for GPT_: Please refer to Github homepage for GPT_SoVITS configuration
Mode 1: Use provided reference audio onl: Mode 1: Use provided reference audio only
Mode 2: Use first audio from video as re: Mode 2: Use first audio from video as reference
Mode 3: Use each audio from video as ref: Mode 3: Use each audio from video as reference
Configure reference audio mode for GPT-S: Configure reference audio mode for GPT-SoVITS
This stage includes the following steps:: This stage includes the following steps:
Sentence segmentation using NLP and LLM: Sentence segmentation using NLP and LLM
Please review these subtitle lines after: Please review these subtitle lines after generation. They may contain words or phrases with multiple possible meanings.
Subtitle generation is complete. Please: Subtitle generation is complete. Please review the ambiguity report before merging subtitles into the video.
Subtitle generation is complete. No ambi: Subtitle generation is complete. No ambiguity report was generated. Please choose subtitle mode before merging subtitles into the video.
Subtitle generation is complete. Please: Subtitle generation is complete. Please choose subtitle mode before merging subtitles into the video.
Ambiguity review is pending. Please conf: Ambiguity review is pending. Please confirm before merging subtitles into the video.
I have reviewed it, continue merging vid: I have reviewed it, continue merging video
Synced subtitle files from: Will sync all subtitle files from
No video title or description found: No video title or description found
⚠️ PAUSE_BEFORE_TRANSLATE. Go to `output: ⚠️ PAUSE_BEFORE_TRANSLATE. Go to `output/log/terminology.json` to edit terminology. Then press ENTER to continue...
Subtitle processing failed. Please check: Subtitle processing failed. Please check the terminal logs.
The task has stopped and is no longer lo: The task has stopped and is no longer locked. You can fix the issue and continue from the failed step.
The task process is no longer running. T: The task process is no longer running. The GUI has refreshed to the latest stopped state.
The task was interrupted by a page refre: The task was interrupted by a page refresh or Streamlit rerun. It has been unlocked and can continue from the stopped step.
No detailed error was recorded for this: No detailed error was recorded for this older failure.
Pause requested. The task will pause aft: Pause requested. The task will pause after the current step.
Stop requested. The task will stop after: Stop requested. The task will stop after the current step.
Audio processing is complete! You can ch: Audio processing is complete! You can check the audio files in the `output` folder.
Hello, welcome to VideoLingo. If you enc: Hello, welcome to VideoLingo. If you encounter any issues, feel free to get instant answers with our Free QA Agent here! You can also try out our SaaS website at videolingo.io for free!
Local runtime requires >8GB GPU, cloud r: Local runtime requires >8GB GPU, cloud runtime requires 302ai API key, elevenlabs runtime requires ElevenLabs API key
Do you need to auto-configure PyPI mirro: Do you need to auto-configure PyPI mirrors? (Recommended if you have difficulty accessing pypi.org)
🎮 NVIDIA GPU detected, installing CUDA v: 🎮 NVIDIA GPU detected, installing CUDA version of PyTorch...

💻 No NVIDIA GPU detected, installing CPU: 🍎 MacOS detected, installing CPU version of PyTorch... Note: it might be slow during whisperX transcription.
🔄 After installing FFmpeg, please run th: 🔄 After installing FFmpeg, please run this installer again:
FFmpeg is required. Please install it an: FFmpeg is required. Please install it and run the installer again.

No NVIDIA GPU detected or NVIDIA drivers: No NVIDIA GPU detected or NVIDIA drivers not properly installed
Enable if your LLM supports JSON mode ou: Enable if your LLM supports JSON mode output
Used for summary, terminology, splitting: Used for summary, terminology, splitting, alignment, trimming and JSON tasks
Used only for plain subtitle translation: Used only for plain subtitle translation
Keep off for plain translation models li: Keep off for plain translation models like Hy-MT2
This looks like a merged subtitle video. Select an original video to avoid subtitle overlap.
Please add or select a video first: Please add or select a video first
Single bilingual SRT: translation above: Single bilingual SRT: translation above source
Auto start subtitle processing after dow: Auto start subtitle processing after download
A task is already running. Please wait u: A task is already running. Please wait until it finishes.
Click to load this language pair: Click to load this language pair
Click to load this API profile: Click to load this API profile
Customize the watermark name shown above: Customize the watermark name shown above bilingual subtitles
Save and reuse subtitle and watermark la: Save and reuse subtitle and watermark layout presets
Show semi-transparent watermark above su: Show semi-transparent watermark above subtitles in bilingual mode
Pixels between watermark and top subtitl: Vertical watermark offset in pixels; positive moves up, negative moves down. Preview updates live.
large-v3 is more accurate; large-v3-turb: large-v3 is more accurate; large-v3-turbo is faster
spacy_model_missing: Spacy model {model} is not installed. Run: python -m spacy download {model}
remote_translator_notice: Remote LLM detected as translator. The workflow model JSON pipeline will be used for higher quality and reliable translation. Temperature, MaxTokens, Translation Workers settings only apply to local translator models.
Use the workflow model to reflect and po: Use the workflow model to reflect and polish local translator output
Use the workflow model to detect ambiguo: Use the workflow model to detect ambiguous words/phrases in local translator output
Run ambiguity check on already-translate: Run ambiguity check on already-translated subtitles using the workflow model
Running ambiguity check... This may take: Running ambiguity check... This may take a few minutes.
Ambiguity check failed. See server log f: Ambiguity check failed. See server log for details.
chrome, safari, firefox — yt-dlp reads c: chrome, safari, firefox — yt-dlp reads cookies directly from your browser
Path to a Netscape-format cookies.txt fi: Path to a Netscape-format cookies.txt file (optional, browser cookies are preferred)
Model changed since last translation — r: Model changed since last translation — re-run translation step only
Translation API profile changed. You can: Translation API profile changed. You can re-translate the current subtitles without re-running transcription.
Only re-run translation, subtitle splitt: Only re-run translation, subtitle splitting, timestamp generation and optional video merge
Choose WhisperX for stricter alignment o: Choose WhisperX for stricter alignment or MLX Whisper for Apple Silicon Metal acceleration
Use these tools only when a task is not: Use these tools only when a task is not running.
Landscape: vertical offset when source h: Landscape: vertical offset when source hard subtitles already exist
Landscape: vertical offset for bilingual: Landscape: vertical offset for bilingual subtitle block; positive moves up, negative moves down
Landscape: pixels between watermark and: Landscape: pixels between watermark and top subtitle line
Check final SRT structure, timing, align: Check final SRT structure, timing, alignment and suspicious fragments before video merge
The report does not modify subtitle file: The report does not modify subtitle files. Please verify flagged passages before merging.
Unexpected ellipsis inside a source phra: Unexpected ellipsis inside a source phrase; verify this passage against the audio.
Reference font size at 1080p; scales wit: Reference font size at 1080p; scales with video height
No original video found in this history: No original video found in this history project
\"auto\": smart placement based on hard-: Auto: smart placement based on hard-sub position — places translation above when hard-sub is near the bottom
